title: 抽象可扩展的分层菜单框架
summary: 完成分层菜单框架的故事级收口：将命令入口整理为可扩展的菜单树模型，补充了分层菜单说明，并新增回归测试以锁定一级菜单、子菜单、返回导航和既有命令可达性。

riskReasons: Incomplete changed-file evidence reduces rollback confidence.
releaseNotes: Completed scope: 抽象可扩展的分层菜单框架.
rollbackHints: Review and revert these paths together if rollback is needed: (unable to determine changed files automatically).
Use the story-scoped commit as the primary rollback unit before considering any selective revert.
followUps: 若后续新增三级及更深层菜单，继续沿用 menu.nodes 扩展并补齐分支级可达性测试。
如需把菜单排序能力扩展到子菜单层级，应单独评估配置结构，避免与现有 rootMenuOrder 语义混淆。
evidenceGaps: Changed file scope could not be fully determined.
